title: adult friendship is opening your calendar and realizing the
content:
adult friendship is opening your calendar and realizing the next free weekend you both have is seven weeks away. so you pick a date, circle it,
and add a reminder two days before.
and when the day finally comes, you sit across from each other
and talk about everything you meant to share throughout the busy weeks.
you leave the restaurant feeling better. wondering why you don't do this more often. even though you already know. life gets so loud.
but friendship is choosing each other despite the noise and having grace for it taking so long to catch up.
